title: FireballFight
description: FireballFight is a fast-paced Bedwars-style PvP minigame where players battle using fireballs
body:
## What this plugin is -
**FireballFight** is a bedwars style pvp minigame powered by Fireballs, where you have to hop onto enemy's island, destroy his bed and kill him in order to elimate him, there is a cosmetic system too which u can use to change your hotbar layout or to change the trail of your fireballs.

> For Custom Plugins - [Join Discord](https://discord.gg/qg42afhafT)
> 
> Tested By [UltraVM](https://ultravm.in/)

## Dependencies -
Currently the plugin **does not require any dependency** in order to function properly.

## Permissions -

```
fireballfight.admin - gives admin permissions
fireballfight.use - default user permissions
```


## Trail permissions -

```
No trail - no permission required
Smoke trail - fireballfight.trails.smoke
Flame trail - fireballfight.trails.flame
Critical trail - fireballfight.trails.critical
Heart trail - fireballfight.trails.heart
Water trail - fireballfight.trails.water
Lava trail - fireballfight.trails.lava
Snow trail - fireballfight.trails.snow
Enchant trail - fireballfight.trails.enchant
Totem trail - fireballfight.trails.totem
Witch trail - fireballfight.trails.witch
Portal trail - fireballfight.trails.portal
Dragon breath trail - fireballfight.trails.dragon_breath
Soul fire trail - fireballfight.trails.soul_fire
Squid ink trail - fireballfight.trails.squid_ink
Spore trail - fireballfight.trails.spore
Note trail - fireballfight.trails.note
Happy villager trail - fireballfight.trails.happy_villager
Slime trail - fireballfight.trails.slime
Composter trail - fireballfight.trails.composter
Angry villager trail - fireballfight.trails.angry_villager
Damage trail - fireballfight.trails.damage
Explosion trail - fireballfight.trails.explosion
Dust trail - fireballfight.trails.dust
Sweep trail - fireballfight.trails.sweep
Bubble - fireballfight.trails.bubble
Flash trail - fireballfight.trails.flash
```

## How to give permissions -

> U can use [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms) to give any permission from above to get its respected benefits

## How to install plugin -

- Download plugin's latest version from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fireballfight)
- Put the plugin into your server's **plugins** folder
- Restart your server
- Then setup an arena using commands, u can see the commands [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fireballfight/gallery)
